title: thysselinum sylvestre
intro: Thysselinum sylvestre, also known as sweet cicely, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of volatile oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of sweet cicely include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Sweet cicely is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
